This article has been imported with the following changes : 

* The man page references were converted to entities so that 
appropriate links could be created for online viewing. 
* Devicenames wrapped in <devicename> 
* Commands wrapped in <command> 
* Files wrapped in <filename> 
etc.. 

Thanks for your submission!
